sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94997" key="sklhropagh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκληρο-πᾰγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n94997.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">firmly put together, hard</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:2:58:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
